entity.summary: HyperEVM decentralized exchange and public liquidity layer providing routed token swaps, concentrated-liquidity pools, liquidity management, ve(3,3) incentives, gauges, and related trading infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation support active DEX classification. HEI consolidates Hybra Finance and V2/V3/V4 discovery rows into one entity rather than splitting AMM versions or pool implementations.

evidence.title: Hybra Foundation Whitepaper
evidence.notes: First-party whitepaper identifies Hybra as a Hyperliquid/HyperEVM ve(3,3) DEX and documents Uniswap V3-style concentrated liquidity, swaps, routing, fees, liquidity incentives, and planned trading infrastructure.

evidence.title: Hybra Trade
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading documentation describes Hybra as HyperEVM's public liquidity layer, compares routes across major aggregators, executes swaps, exposes route and price-impact previews, and links the live Hybra trade surface.

evidence.title: Hybra Liquidity
evidence.notes: Current first-party liquidity documentation links the live Hybra liquidity surface and documents pool discovery and liquidity-management workflows.
